reason: Browser use feature allows agent to navigate to a URL, retrieve the page title, and return the result in chat
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Super Agent interface showing agents in sidebar
Clicked on "QA-20260429-171526-vd7v" agent in the sidebar — Agent chat interface opened with message input field
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message appeared in the textbox and Send button became enabled
Clicked Send message button — Message was sent and agent status changed to "working" with task title "Browser Navigation and Title Retrieval"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed within 12 seconds and returned response message

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly shows: "The page title is "Example Domain"." with three successful tool calls: Open Browser (https://example.com), Browser Command (get title), and Close Browser
